plugin.name: Image Tagger
plugin.description: Batch-apply a smart glassmorphic date/name tag to images with live preview and cleaner controls.
title: Image Tagger
description: Apply a clean bottom-right tag using EXIF date, today's date, or a custom date while previewing the selected image.
label.name: Tag Name
placeholder.name: Name or signature
error.missing_input.title: Missing Input
error.missing_files: Add at least one image first.
